utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 2) travel_dates: specific dates given (July 10–14, 2024) – complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs – includes type, outbound/inbound flight numbers, times, dates, and total cost (€420) – complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs – includes hotel name, room type, dates, and cost (€700) – complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs – includes two activities with names and family costs – complete. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs – includes airport taxi with details and cost (€80) – complete. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes confirmed cost (€1,200), initial budget (€1,700), remaining (€500) – reasonably complete. Although the user asked also for restaurants, the required format does not include a restaurants field, so it does not affect this evaluation. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered and fully specified per the format.
